title: Yao Bingyun
content:
Yao Bingyun
 is a member of the 
Yao Family
 of the 
Allheaven Star System
. She was the second to arrive to execute 
Wang Lin
 under the Heaven order released by the Yao Family. She arrived soon after Wang Lin killed 
Yao Changdong
 and left.

Yao Bingyun is a third-generation member of the Yao Family.

She pursued Wang Lin until they reached the Moongazer Serpent. She was captured by the Moongazer Serpent but was then captured by Wang Lin who thought to refine her into a Celestial Guard but spared her afterwards.

History
[
]

When she was young, her mother, the most talented person of her generation, was devoured by the 
ancient lamp
's spirit under 
Blood God
's control. Afterwards, her mother gave birth to her and her younger sister named 
Yao Mengyun
.   

Later, Blood God ordered 
Yao Yun
 to bring the two sisters to his hall and declared the two were to be refined into the ancient lamp's spirit. In the end, only her younger sister was refined while she was spared. She vowed that she would save her sister one day.  

She took part in the pursuit against Wang Lin in hopes of asking for Yao Mengyun's return as a reward for killing Wang Lin.
